## Description of Changes
Please provide a clear and concise summary of the changes made in this Pull Request.

- Related Issue: Fixes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing a tool/validator/schema issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding schema/tooling capabilities)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature modifying schema definitions)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist Before Requesting Review
- [ ] My code follows the repository's code style and formatting standards.
- [ ] I have run `python validators/run_all.py` and all validations passed cleanly.
- [ ] I have run `pytest tests/` and all unit tests passed.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation in `docs/` or `SCHEMA.md`.
